TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_pwn_Tjavualji, title = Tjavualji, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Paiwan]}, url = {https://pwn.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tjavualji} }

S.FORM: Taimali Taimali gu icuwa i Taitung. ala atjunangn mapuljat 102.29 km¬≤ (ma'linpan atjunang 4.53 km¬≤, ma'linaule atjunang 57.38 km¬≤). ala caucau mapuljat 7,128 caucau, ala daceneqlan mapuljat 2,979 a daceneqlan, Puyuma, Amis (67%) a maqcuwa caucau. tjauvali aicu a tjauvali(penaywanan: TjavualjiÔľõ'inamizukan: TjavualjiÔľõkai na taiwan: Th√†i-m√Ę-l√≠-hiongÔľõkai naŚģĘŚģ∂Ť™ěŚõõÁł£ŤÖĒ:tai maňá liňä hiongňä)i pasakacedas a navalj tua taitu tua taiwan, nakidekes tua seputuma,valangaw, a i tjaikacedas mavan a taipingyan, a i tjaikaledep mavananga a jinfeng, a i pasakaledep a navalj mavananga a i daren, a i pasanavalj izua a sedawu. Nakitangez tua gadu i vecekadan tua taiwan, izuazua a lizuk namaka ljeveljevek, izuazua a liyaw a gadu, a tjaljavavavavavan a gadu izua a kuzulj katu sepatj a iday a pasavavaw.(2000ŚÖ¨Śįļ), azua a kina'adavan namasanmaculjuculju a kinavaliyan imaza a caucau i tjauvali, izua tjuruvu(2/3) a pairang kata kasalisiyan (1/3), izua a amizuku, drekay, paiwan, ruqivu tiamadju a sipenaywanan ata kai na amizuku. nu 2000 a cavilj, izua a sikivangavangan a "ŚćÉÁ¶ßŤŅéśõôŚÖČśīĽŚčē", pungadan tua tjauvali, qaw izua a "śó•ŚćášĻčťĄČ"a ngadan auta. paljavak tua atjunang matja 9 qinaljan i Taimali. matja 13 qinaljan imaza, Lupakatj , Tjavualji , Kiring , Tjatjigel , Anasolay , Davugele , Takidis , Padrangigrang , Calavi , Kanadun Sasaljak , Lalauran , Cilalongay . likisi kasicuayanga a ngadan na aicu a tjavuali a "tjavualji" ,mavan a "pazarezar a qadaw tua culj a katjunangan" a siniaya i paiwan a kai. izuazua a ngadan a "Ś§ßŤ≤ďŤ≤ć,Ś§ßťļĽťáĆ" a vinecikan na ciukuk. nu 1920 a cavilj, papungadan taicu a guan a "Ś§™ťļĽťáĆ", qaw inumalj nua sihu a ngadan a "Ś§™ťļĽťáĆŚļĄ", seŚŹįśĚĪŚĽ≥ŚŹįśĚĪťÉ°. nu pakavilji a masanmusalj a makaqeci sekacawan, inumalj a ngadan a "ŚŹįśĚĪÁł£Ś§™ťļĽťáĆťĄČ" patjetucu. zuku izuazua a tjuruvu a zuku i tjavuali, izua a paiwan zuku , amizuku , drekai . izuazua a tjuruvu a zuku i tjavuali, izua a paiwanzuku,amizuku,drekai,Ś§ĖÁúĀšļļ,ťĖ©ŚćóšļļkataŚģĘŚģ∂šļļ. aicu a paiwanzuku imaza, mavan a paqaroqaro ,a sepaqaluqalu. avan a Ś§ßÁéčťÉ®ŤźĹa kava,kakudanan niamadju, nasetevelj ta puyuma kata amizuku. caucau i tjavuali a caucau, tjuruvu(2/3) a pairang, izau zuma a kaimaza a caucau. a kinavadavadayan nua kaimaza a caucau, savid ta kataŚĺ∑ŚÖ∂ťáĆ.qaw, aicu a paiwan zuku, kinavadavaday i kataŚ§öŤČĮśĚĎ.aicu a amizuku, kinavadavaday iŤćíťáé,Ťąäť¶ôŤė≠kataŚĺ∑ŚÖ∂ťáĆ. kivangavangan sipacacikelan palidring a djalan sikamasansivalj a palidring a djalan na taiwan sikamasansimuluq saka ita a palidring a djalan na taiwan
S.PHON: taima…≠i taima…≠i gu i ¶uwa i taituŇč. a…≠a a ¶unaŇčn mapu éat ***.** km* (ma Ē…≠inpan a ¶unaŇč *.** km*, ma Ē…≠inau…≠…ô a ¶unaŇč **.** km*). a…≠a ¶au ¶au mapu éat *,*** ¶au ¶au, a…≠a da ¶…ôn…ôq…≠an mapu éat *,*** a da ¶…ôn…ôq…≠an, pujuma, amis (**%) a maq ¶uwa ¶au ¶au. ¶auva…≠i ai ¶u a ¶auva…≠i(p…ônajwanan: ¶avua éi* Ēinamizukan: ¶avua éi*kai na taiwan: th*i-m*-…≠*-hiuŇč*kai na******:tai ma* …≠i* hiuŇč*)i pasaka ¶…ôdas a nava é tua taitu tua taiwan, nakid…ôk…ôs tua s…ôputuma,va…≠aŇčaw, a i ¶aika ¶…ôdas mavan a taipiŇčjan, a i ¶aika…≠…ôd…ôp mavanaŇča a jin*…ôŇč, a i pasaka…≠…ôd…ôp a nava é mavanaŇča a i dar…ôn, a i pasanava é izua a s…ôdawu. nakitaŇč…ôz tua gadu i v…ô ¶…ôkadan tua taiwan, izuazua a …≠izuk namaka é…ôv…ô é…ôv…ôk, izuazua a …≠ijaw a gadu, a ¶a éavavavavavan a gadu izua a kuzu é katu s…ôpa ¶ a idaj a pasavavaw.(******), azua a kina Ēadavan namasanma ¶u éu ¶u éu a kinava…≠ijan imaza a ¶au ¶au i ¶auva…≠i, izua ¶uruvu(*/*) a pairaŇč kata kasa…≠isijan (*/*), izua a amizuku, …Ė…ôkaj, paiwan, ruqivu tiama…Ču a sip…ônajwanan ata kai na amizuku. nu **** a ¶avi é, izua a sikivaŇčavaŇčan a "*******", puŇčadan tua ¶auva…≠i, qaw izua a "****"a Ňčadan auta. pa éavak tua a ¶unaŇč ma ¶a * qina éan i taima…≠i. ma ¶a ** qina éan imaza, …≠upaka ¶ , ¶avua éi , kiriŇč , ¶a ¶ig…ô…≠ , anasu…≠aj , davug…ô…≠…ô , takidis , pa…ĖaŇčigraŇč , ¶a…≠avi , kanadun sasa éak , …≠a…≠auran , ¶i…≠a…≠uŇčaj . …≠ikisi kasi ¶uajaŇča a Ňčadan na ai ¶u a ¶avua…≠i a " ¶avua éi" ,mavan a "pazar…ôzar a qadaw tua ¶u é a ka ¶unaŇčan" a siniaja i paiwan a kai. izuazua a Ňčadan a "***,***" a vin…ô ¶ikan na ¶iukuk. nu **** a ¶avi é, papuŇčadan tai ¶u a guan a "***", qaw inuma é nua sihu a Ňčadan a "****", s…ô******. nu pakavi éi a masanmusa é a makaq…ô ¶i s…ôka ¶awan, inuma é a Ňčadan a "*******" pa ¶…ôtu ¶u. zuku izuazua a ¶uruvu a zuku i ¶avua…≠i, izua a paiwan zuku , amizuku , …Ė…ôkai . izuazua a ¶uruvu a zuku i ¶avua…≠i, izua a paiwanzuku,amizuku,…Ė…ôkai,***,***kata***. ai ¶u a paiwanzuku imaza, mavan a paqaruqaru ,a s…ôpaqa…≠uqa…≠u. avan a ****a kava,kakudanan niama…Ču, nas…ôt…ôv…ô é ta pujuma kata amizuku. ¶au ¶au i ¶avua…≠i a ¶au ¶au, ¶uruvu(*/*) a pairaŇč, izau zuma a kaimaza a ¶au ¶au. a kinavadavadajan nua kaimaza a ¶au ¶au, savid ta kata***.qaw, ai ¶u a paiwan zuku, kinavadavadaj i kata***.ai ¶u a amizuku, kinavadavadaj i**,***kata***. kivaŇčavaŇčan sipa ¶a ¶ik…ô…≠an pa…≠i…ĖiŇč a …Ča…≠an sikamasansiva é a pa…≠i…ĖiŇč a …Ča…≠an na taiwan sikamasansimu…≠uq saka ita a pa…≠i…ĖiŇč a …Ča…≠an na taiwan
S.FORM: Taimali Taimali gu icuwa i Taitung. ala atjunangn mapuljat 102.29 km¬≤ (ma'linpan atjunang 4.53 km¬≤, ma'linaule atjunang 57.38 km¬≤). ala caucau mapuljat 7,128 caucau, ala daceneqlan mapuljat 2,979 a daceneqlan, Puyuma, Amis (67%) a maqcuwa caucau. tjauvali aicu a tjauvali(penaywanan: TjavualjiÔľõ'inamizukan: TjavualjiÔľõkai na taiwan: Th√†i-m√Ę-l√≠-hiongÔľõkai naŚģĘŚģ∂Ť™ěŚõõÁł£ŤÖĒ:tai maňá liňä hiongňä)i pasakacedas a navalj tua taitu tua taiwan, nakidekes tua seputuma,valangaw, a i tjaikacedas mavan a taipingyan, a i tjaikaledep mavananga a jinfeng, a i pasakaledep a navalj mavananga a i daren, a i pasanavalj izua a sedawu. Nakitangez tua gadu i vecekadan tua taiwan, izuazua a lizuk namaka ljeveljevek, izuazua a liyaw a gadu, a tjaljavavavavavan a gadu izua a kuzulj katu sepatj a iday a pasavavaw.(2000ŚÖ¨Śįļ), azua a kina'adavan namasanmaculjuculju a kinavaliyan imaza a caucau i tjauvali, izua tjuruvu(2/3) a pairang kata kasalisiyan (1/3), izua a amizuku, drekay, paiwan, ruqivu tiamadju a sipenaywanan ata kai na amizuku. nu 2000 a cavilj, izua a sikivangavangan a "ŚćÉÁ¶ßŤŅéśõôŚÖČśīĽŚčē", pungadan tua tjauvali, qaw izua a "śó•ŚćášĻčťĄČ"a ngadan auta. paljavak tua atjunang matja 9 qinaljan i Taimali. matja 13 qinaljan imaza, Lupakatj , Tjavualji , Kiring , Tjatjigel , Anasolay , Davugele , Takidis , Padrangigrang , Calavi , Kanadun Sasaljak , Lalauran , Cilalongay . likisi kasicuayanga a ngadan na aicu a tjavuali a "tjavualji" ,mavan a "pazarezar a qadaw tua culj a katjunangan" a siniaya i paiwan a kai. izuazua a ngadan a "Ś§ßŤ≤ďŤ≤ć,Ś§ßťļĽťáĆ" a vinecikan na ciukuk. nu 1920 a cavilj, papungadan taicu a guan a "Ś§™ťļĽťáĆ", qaw inumalj nua sihu a ngadan a "Ś§™ťļĽťáĆŚļĄ", seŚŹįśĚĪŚĽ≥ŚŹįśĚĪťÉ°. nu pakavilji a masanmusalj a makaqeci sekacawan, inumalj a ngadan a "ŚŹįśĚĪÁł£Ś§™ťļĽťáĆťĄČ" patjetucu. zuku izuazua a tjuruvu a zuku i tjavuali, izua a paiwan zuku , amizuku , drekai . izuazua a tjuruvu a zuku i tjavuali, izua a paiwanzuku,amizuku,drekai,Ś§ĖÁúĀšļļ,ťĖ©ŚćóšļļkataŚģĘŚģ∂šļļ. aicu a paiwanzuku imaza, mavan a paqaroqaro ,a sepaqaluqalu. avan a Ś§ßÁéčťÉ®ŤźĹa kava,kakudanan niamadju, nasetevelj ta puyuma kata amizuku. caucau i tjavuali a caucau, tjuruvu(2/3) a pairang, izau zuma a kaimaza a caucau. a kinavadavadayan nua kaimaza a caucau, savid ta kataŚĺ∑ŚÖ∂ťáĆ.qaw, aicu a paiwan zuku, kinavadavaday i kataŚ§öŤČĮśĚĎ.aicu a amizuku, kinavadavaday iŤćíťáé,Ťąäť¶ôŤė≠kataŚĺ∑ŚÖ∂ťáĆ. kivangavangan sipacacikelan palidring a djalan sikamasansivalj a palidring a djalan na taiwan sikamasansimuluq saka ita a palidring a djalan na taiwan

¶…ôn…ôq…≠an mapu éat *,*** a da ¶…ôn…ôq…≠an, pujuma, amis (**%) a maq ¶uwa ¶au ¶au. ¶auva…≠i ai ¶u a ¶auva…≠i(p…ônajwanan: ¶avua éi* Ēinamizukan: ¶avua éi*kai na taiwan: th*i-m*-…≠*-hiuŇč*kai na******:tai ma* …≠i* hiuŇč*)i pasaka ¶…ôdas a nava é tua taitu tua taiwan, nakid…ôk…ôs tua s…ôputuma,va…≠aŇčaw, a i ¶aika ¶…ôdas mavan a taipiŇčjan, a i ¶aika…≠…ôd…ôp mavanaŇča a jin*…ôŇč, a i pasaka…≠…ôd…ôp a nava é mavanaŇča a i dar…ôn, a i pasanava é izua a s…ôdawu. nakitaŇč…ôz tua gadu i v…ô ¶…ôkadan tua taiwan, izuazua a …≠izuk namaka é…ôv…ô é…ôv…ôk, izuazua a …≠ijaw a gadu, a ¶a éavavavavavan a gadu izua a kuzu é katu s…ôpa ¶ a idaj a pasavavaw.(******), azua a kina Ēadavan namasanma ¶u éu ¶u éu a kinava…≠ijan imaza a ¶au ¶au i ¶auva…≠i, izua ¶uruvu(*/*) a pairaŇč kata kasa…≠isijan (*/*), izua a amizuku, …Ė…ôkaj, paiwan, ruqivu tiama…Ču a sip…ônajwanan ata kai na amizuku. nu **** a ¶avi é, izua a sikivaŇčavaŇčan a "*******", puŇčadan tua ¶auva…≠i, qaw izua a "****"a Ňčadan auta. pa éavak tua a ¶unaŇč ma ¶a * qina éan i taima…≠i. ma ¶a ** qina éan imaza, …≠upaka ¶ , ¶avua éi , kiriŇč , ¶a ¶ig…ô…≠ , anasu…≠aj , davug…ô…≠…ô , takidis , pa…ĖaŇčigraŇč , ¶a…≠avi , kanadun sasa éak , …≠a…≠auran , ¶i…≠a…≠uŇčaj . …≠ikisi kasi ¶uajaŇča a Ňčadan na ai ¶u a ¶avua…≠i a " ¶avua éi" ,mavan a "pazar…ôzar a qadaw tua ¶u é a ka ¶unaŇčan" a siniaja i paiwan a kai. izuazua a Ňčadan a "***,***" a vin…ô ¶ikan na ¶iukuk. nu **** a ¶avi é, papuŇčadan tai ¶u a guan a "***", qaw inuma é nua sihu a Ňčadan a "****", s…ô******. nu pakavi éi a masanmusa é a makaq…ô ¶i s…ôka ¶awan, inuma é a Ňčadan a "*******" pa ¶…ôtu ¶u. zuku izuazua a ¶uruvu a zuku i ¶avua…≠i, izua a paiwan zuku , amizuku , …Ė…ôkai . izuazua a ¶uruvu a zuku i ¶avua…≠i, izua a paiwanzuku,amizuku,…Ė…ôkai,***,***kata***. ai ¶u a paiwanzuku imaza, mavan a paqaruqaru ,a s…ôpaqa…≠uqa…≠u. avan a ****a kava,kakudanan niama…Ču, nas…ôt…ôv…ô é ta pujuma kata amizuku. ¶au ¶au i ¶avua…≠i a ¶au ¶au, ¶uruvu(*/*) a pairaŇč, izau zuma a kaimaza a ¶au ¶au. a kinavadavadajan nua kaimaza a ¶au ¶au, savid ta kata***.qaw, ai ¶u a paiwan zuku, kinavadavadaj i kata***.ai ¶u a amizuku, kinavadavadaj i**,***kata***. kivaŇčavaŇčan sipa ¶a ¶ik…ô…≠an pa…≠i…ĖiŇč a …Ča…≠an sikamasansiva é a pa…≠i…ĖiŇč a …Ča…≠an na taiwan sikamasansimu…≠uq saka ita a pa…≠i…ĖiŇč a …Ča…≠an na taiwan
